text.title: Launch Readiness Review Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree on observable signals to apply / skip / route-elsewhere. Each leaf references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

conclusion.verdict: too soon (compress to launch-readiness-light) or too far (re-plan)
use solo launch checklist; full 8-gate is overkill
run full 8-gate review with T-7/T-3/T-1 snapshots

text.example: external_new=true -> window_ok=true -> team_ok=true -> run full review (rule eight-gate-coverage).
